ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-09-2006 Reset To Jan-04-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, VJ. Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Petitioner: Cherrie Carlisle, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Aaron Brandon Dakota Carlisle.
Lacks the Minor's Father consent or proof of service on notice, the OSC for Change of Name of a Minor is continued to Jan. 4, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
Petitioner to submit proof of service to the Minor's father of the new hearing date or Order dispensing with notice.
